title: Device Home Screen - Battery Charging Icon
scenario: Verify battery charging icon behavior on the Device Home Screen when a paired headset/earbuds is connected to a charger and then disconnected.
steps: 1. Pair and connect a headset/earbuds to the device.
2. Observe the Device Home Screen to confirm the battery icon is displayed.
3. Connect the device to a charger.
4. Observe the battery icon change to show a bolt icon instead of the percentage value.
5. Disconnect the charger from the device.
6. Observe the bolt icon disappear and the percentage value reappear.
expected: When a headset/earbuds is paired and connected, the battery icon is displayed. When the device is connected to a charger, the battery icon changes to show a bolt icon instead of the percentage value. When the charger is disconnected, the bolt icon disappears and the percentage value is displayed again.
